title: PWA Offline + Push Notifications
summary: Harden offline support with thorough service worker caching and versioning, add offline status indicator, ensure daily challenge works offline, add Install App prompt, and implement push notification infrastructure for daily challenge reminders, weekly puzzle alerts, and streak at-risk warnings. All notifications are opt-in with per-type toggles in settings.

tasks.description: Audit and update the service worker to ensure ALL game assets (JS, CSS, HTML, manifest, SVG icons) are cached for offline play. Add all JS files from the current load order and the CSS file. Use a versioned cache name that can be bumped each deploy.
acceptance_criteria: sw.js ASSETS array includes every file referenced in index.html script/link tags
Cache name includes a version that can be bumped
Install event pre-caches all ASSETS
Old caches are cleaned up on activate

tasks.description: Add cache versioning: when CACHE_NAME changes, the activate event must clean old caches. Ensure the sw.js already does this (verify/fix). Add a cache-first strategy with network fallback for non-cached resources.
acceptance_criteria: Activate event deletes all caches except current CACHE_NAME
Fetch event uses cache-first, then network fallback
Non-precached requests fall through to network and optionally get cached on the fly

tasks.description: Add offline indicator: show subtle '📴 Offline' badge when navigator.onLine is false. Display it in a fixed position at the top of the screen. Remove when back online.
acceptance_criteria: A fixed-position badge appears at top-center when offline
Badge disappears when connection restored
Badge has subtle styling matching game aesthetic (dark background, green text)
Does not block gameplay interaction

tasks.description: Ensure daily challenge generation works offline — it uses a date-based seed so it should work without network. Verify and add a comment confirming this in levels.js.
acceptance_criteria: Daily challenge generation uses only date-based seed, no network calls
Comment in generateDailyChallenge confirms offline compatibility

tasks.description: Add 'Install App' prompt for mobile users. Listen for the beforeinstallprompt event, save the deferred prompt, then show a subtle install banner after the 3rd session (tracked in localStorage). Banner has 'Install' and 'Not now' buttons.
acceptance_criteria: beforeinstallprompt event is captured and deferred
Install banner only shows after 3+ sessions
Banner shows at bottom of level select screen with Install and Dismiss buttons
'Not now' hides banner and doesn't show again for 7 days
Install button triggers the deferred prompt
Session count tracked in localStorage

tasks.description: Add notification permission request infrastructure. Create a NotificationManager class in main.js that handles permission requests, stores preferences, and provides methods for scheduling local notifications. Request permission subtly after 3+ sessions (same trigger as install prompt).
acceptance_criteria: NotificationManager class with requestPermission(), scheduleNotification(), getPreferences(), setPreference() methods
Permission requested only after 3+ sessions
Permission result stored in localStorage
Graceful degradation when Notification API is not available

tasks.description: Daily challenge notification: schedule a local notification at the player's typical play time saying 'Today's Daily Challenge is ready!'. Use the service worker's showNotification API if permission granted. Typical play time estimated from last 7 daily challenge completion timestamps, defaulting to 10am.
acceptance_criteria: Daily notification scheduled via setTimeout/setInterval for current session
Shows only if daily challenge not yet completed today
Default time is 10:00am local, updated based on play history
Notification text includes challenge emoji and encouragement

tasks.description: Weekly notification: 'New Puzzle of the Week!' notification triggered on session start if it's a new week and the weekly puzzle hasn't been played.
acceptance_criteria: Weekly notification shown on session start if new week detected
Only shows once per week
Week boundary tracked in localStorage
Notification appears as in-app toast rather than system notification to be less intrusive

tasks.description: Streak at-risk notification: show an in-app alert/toast when a play streak of 3+ days would expire tonight (no play recorded today and it's after 6pm). Also schedule a system notification for 8pm if streak is at risk.
acceptance_criteria: In-app toast shown on session start if streak at risk (3+ streak, no play today, after 6pm)
Toast says something like 'Your 5-day streak expires tonight — play now!'
System notification scheduled for 8pm if streak at risk and permission granted
Doesn't show if streak is 0 or already played today

tasks.description: Add notification settings section in the settings area of level select screen. Three toggles: Daily Challenge, Weekly Puzzle, Streak Alerts. Each stored in localStorage and respected by the notification system. Update cache bust version.
acceptance_criteria: Three toggle buttons in settings row for notification types
Toggles persist in localStorage
NotificationManager reads these preferences before showing any notification
All notification types default to ON when permission is first granted
Cache bust version incremented in index.html script/link tags and sw.js CACHE_NAME

testing_focus: Offline mode works — game loads and plays without network
Service worker caches all assets correctly
Install prompt shows at right time and works
Notification settings toggles work and persist
Streak at-risk detection logic is correct
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced affecting core gameplay or save/load, revert to previous commit
